[[Lord/Legends|Lord]] '''Cuvir''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Firro]], his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], early in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
An overbearing and ruthless man, Lord Cuvir oversaw the Imperial takeover of Firro prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], apparently subjugating the planet himself before the Empire formally took control of it. The Imperial forces under Cuvir's command committed a number of terrible atrocities to the citizens of Firro. After the Empire solidified its control over the populace, Cuvir was named Firro's Imperial Governor.

While on a visit to one of the planet's crowded relief stations, Cuvir took notice of a [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] designated [[2-1B/Legends|2-1B]]. Impressed with the [[Droid/Legends|droid's]] skill and determination, Cuvir took 2-1B as his own personal physician, leaving the people of his homeworld to less efficient care.

Sometime after the Battle of Yavin, Lord Cuvir paid visit to his personal mansion on the planet [[Wor Tandell/Legends|Wor Tandell]] with 2-1B to accompany him. There, Cuvir discovered one of his aides preparing a coded [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]] full of [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial fleet]] movements in the [[Tandell system]] and was about to arrest the man on suspicion of being a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] when a scuffle ensued between the two. The aide shot Cuvir with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], killing him instantly. 2-1B, who had long considered his master the most evil being he had ever met, nevertheless tried to save Cuvir, remaining true to this programming, but there was nothing that could be done.

2-1B discovered that the "aide" was actually a Rebel agent named [[Tay Vanis|Tiree]]. Tiree convinced 2-1B to defect to the Rebel Alliance.
